app.name: Muro Music
header.library.subtitle: All tracks in one long list. Use columns to tune the view.
header.inbox.subtitle: Review and categorize new imports before accepting them into the library.
header.settings.subtitle: Personalize the app layout, themes, and preferences.
header.recentlyPlayed.subtitle: Tracks you've listened to recently.
recentlyPlayed.empty.title: No recently played tracks
recentlyPlayed.empty.description: Play some music to see your listening history here.
search.label: Search
columns.label: Columns
settings.theme.help: Theme colors are driven by CSS variables and update instantly.
settings.language.help: Controls the language for app text.
settings.dev.clearSongs.confirm.title: Empty song database
settings.dev.clearSongs.confirm.body: This will delete all songs from the database. Continue?
delete.title: Delete songs
delete.subtitle: Choose what should happen to {count} selected song(s).
delete.libraryOnly.help: Keep the audio files on disk and remove them from Muro, including all playlists.
delete.disk.help: Permanently delete the audio files and remove them from Muro. This cannot be undone.
delete.toast.failed: Could not delete {count} file(s); they remain in the library.
player.empty.title: Nothing playing
player.empty.subtitle: Select a track to start playback.
player.output.heading: Play on
player.output.noDevices: No playback devices found on this network.
player.output.noDevicesHint: This computer and the device must be on the same network.
player.output.unsupported: This format cannot be played on this device yet
player.output.loadFailed: The track could not be loaded on the device
player.output.connectFailed: Could not connect to the device
playlist.create.title: New playlist
playlist.create.subtitle: Give your playlist a name to get started.
columns.title: Title
header.playlist.subtitle: {count} tracks
playlist.empty.title: Playlist is empty
playlist.empty.description: Drag tracks here from the library to add them to this playlist.

playlist.edit.subtitle: Update the playlist name.
playlist.duplicates.title: Duplicate tracks
playlist.duplicates.subtitle: The following tracks are already in this playlist:

analysis.subtitle: Analyzing audio to detect BPM and musical key.
edit.subtitle.batch: Only changed fields will be applied to all selected tracks.
